Air transportation safety investigations and reports

How to use the index
  • To sort the list, click on the column headers. Change the sort order by clicking on the arrows.
  • To sort more than one column at a time, hold down your Shift key and select your headers.
  • To find items in the list, enter them in the filter. You can enter more than one item, e.g., bird strike ontario.
  • To search in the reports themselves, use the Search box at the top right of the page.
  • If you cannot find the report of an investigation that began in 1991 or later, contact us.
  • To find the report of an investigation that began in 1990 or earlier, contact Library and Archives Canada.
